query_title: Godzilla x Kong: The New Empire

recommendations.title: Godzilla vs. Kong
recommendations.overview: In a time when monsters walk the Earth, humanity’s fight for its future sets Godzilla and Kong on a collision course that will see the two most powerful forces of nature on the planet collide in a spectacular battle for the ages.

recommendations.title: Blair Witch
recommendations.overview: Students on a camping trip discover something sinister is lurking beyond the trees.

recommendations.title: The Guest
recommendations.overview: A soldier introduces himself to the Peterson family, claiming to be a friend of their son who died in action. After the young man is welcomed into their home, a series of accidental deaths seem to be connected to his presence.

recommendations.title: You're Next
recommendations.overview: When the Davison family comes under attack during their wedding anniversary getaway, the gang of mysterious killers soon learns that one of their victims harbors a secret talent for fighting back.

recommendations.title: Death Note
recommendations.overview: Light Turner finds a supernatural notebook and uses it to mete out death, attracting the attention of a detective, a demon and a girl in his class.

recommendations.title: V/H/S/2
recommendations.overview: Inside a darkened house looms a column of TVs littered with VHS tapes, a pagan shrine to forgotten analog gods. The screens crackle and pop endlessly with monochrome vistas of static white noise permeating the brain and fogging concentration. But you
recommendations.director: Gareth Evans, Eduardo Sánchez, Timo Tjahjanto, Jason Eisener, Adam Wingard, Gregg Hale, Simon Barrett

recommendations.title: The Transformers: The Movie
recommendations.genres: Animation, Science Fiction, Action, Adventure, Family
recommendations.overview: The Autobots must stop a colossal planet-consuming robot who goes after the Autobot Matrix of Leadership. At the same time, they must defend themselves against an all-out attack from the Decepticons.

recommendations.title: Godzilla vs. King Ghidorah
recommendations.overview: The Futurians, time-travelers from the 23rd century, arrive in Japan to warn them of the nation's destruction under Godzilla. They offer to help erase Godzilla from history by preventing his creation. With Godzilla seemingly gone, a new monster emerg

recommendations.title: Everything Everywhere All at Once
recommendations.overview: An aging Chinese immigrant is swept up in an insane adventure, where she alone can save what's important to her by connecting with the lives she could have led in other universes.

recommendations.title: V/H/S
recommendations.overview: When a group of misfits is hired by an unknown third party to burglarize a desolate house and acquire one rare VHS tape, they discover more found footage than they had bargained for.
recommendations.director: Tyler Gillett, David Bruckner, Glenn McQuaid, Joe Swanberg, Ti West, Justin Martinez, Adam Wingard, Chad Villella, Matt Bettinelli-Olpin
